sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with tomsmith / SuperSecretPassword!, then click the logout button on the secure area page

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter credentials and attempt to log in.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with ID 'username' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with ID 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the text input with ID 'password'

workflow.name: On Secure Area Page
workflow.description: Confirm successful login and then log out.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a button with text 'Logout' is visible

workflow.name: Logged Out
workflow.description: Confirm that the logout was successful and the user is returned to the login page.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with ID 'username' is visible
actions: Terminate: Successfully logged in and logged out.

workflow.name: On Wikipedia Homepage
workflow.description: Search for a specific topic on Wikipedia.

workflow.description: If a disambiguation page appears, click the first listed meaning.

workflow.name: On Article Page
workflow.description: The article page is loaded, either directly or after disambiguation.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2, start the loading, wait until the hidden text finishes loading, then read it

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Dynamic Loading Page
workflow.description: Click the 'Start' button to initiate the loading process.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If a button with text 'Start' is visible

workflow.name: Waiting for Hidden Text
workflow.description: Wait for the hidden text to appear after loading completes.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If a loading indicator is visible

workflow.name: Hidden Text Loaded
workflow.description: Confirm the hidden text has loaded and read it.

If a div with id 'finish' and text 'Hello World!' is visible
actions: Read the text content of the div with id 'finish'

lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.
Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.
